titleStmt.title: SII 24.45: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 45. (A.R. No. 167 of 1951-52.) NĀḺIKĒṬṬĀṈVĀŚAL, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS.

summary.p: Registers an agreement (sammātattīṭṭu) by the shepherd Āchchaṉ Gōvaddan and five others to supply ghee to the lamp endowed by Sēnāpatigaḷ Irājanārāyaṇa Muṉaiyadaraiyar alias Koṭṭūruḍaiyāṉ Arayaṉ Rājēndrachōḷaṉ with the 96 sheep endowed for the purpose by the same donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari
Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemi Aḷavun
tannemi kiṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅ
kopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattiṟu
toḻilāl putumaṇarntu matuvaraiyi
ṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayir munai ko
n=taḷavaracar tantaḷamiṟiya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu
t toḷ vali kāṭṭip poṟpaṟi naṭāttik
kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭi
tenticai temaru kamalappūmakaḷ po
tumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyu nanilap
pāvai tanimaiyun=tavirap punitaṟṟirumaṇi
makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭittannaṭi Iraṇṭun taṭa muṭiyā
katFor tokonnilaven=tar cūṭa munnai manuvāṟu perukak
kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toruñ
cella veṇkuṭai Irunilaviḷākameṅkaṇunta
nātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meru
vil puliviḷaiyāṭa kaṭaṟṟivān=tarattup pūpa
r tiṟai viṭu tan=ta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟaini
ṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai
parun=talaittiṭa taṉ ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkula piṟai
pol niṟpiḻai En=tañ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villeti
r koṭā vikkalan kalatarnaṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭu
venat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa
veṅkaḷirum viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina viṟamuṅ kiṭappa E
ṟina malaikaḷum mutuku neṭippa Iḻin=ta netikaḷuñ cuḻa
nṟuṭaintoṭa
viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun=talaivirittalamara kuṭaticai tannāḷukan=ta [ tānum
tānaiyum] pannāḷiṭṭa (ma) palapala mutuku payantetir māṟina jeyapperun tiru vum
paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷariroṇkaṇmaṭantaiyariṭṭamu
miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niṟaiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaḷame
nnum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicai kaikkoṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi ma
ṇṭalaṅkoḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkaḷum
porukaritaraṅkamum tantiravāriyu muṭaittāy vantu
vaṭakaṭal ten kaṭal pāyvatu pola tan peruñcenaiyai Evippañ
cavaraivarum poruta porkaḷattañci veru naḷittoṭa
Araṇarappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭṭippaṭutti maṟṟavar tammai
vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟa veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vijayastampam ticai toṟu niṟutti
muttin kalāpamum muttamiṭ potiyilu
matta veṅkari paṭu maiyyaccayya
muṅ kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷi tennāṭ ṭellai kāṭṭiya ku
nāṭṭuḷḷa cāverellām tanivicum peṟa māveriya tan lai varaik
kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāruṭpaṭa neṟitoṟu nilaikaḷi rai koḷ
siṅhāsanantiriyaviṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramun tirupuyatta ḷum poliya vi
(ā)ramuntiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka viṟ kovirājake
saripanmarāna cakkravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅka coḻadevaṟku Āvatu
ḷ . +ḷ dha+ tiruvaraṅkattup paḷḷi koṇṭaruḷukiṟa Anan=ta nārāya nmikaḷukku
Āḻvār koyiliṭaiyan Āccan kovattanāna periya � num peru
vāyil pakuvāyanāna tirumāliruñcolai konum Āritan śrīmaturai
kkonum maṇavāḷan cāttanum paḷḷi koṇṭān raṅkan ko
nuyyānu maṇavāḷan kovattanāna maṇavāḷak konu ṅkakko
pāka Ivvaṉaivom sammāta tta
ṭṭukkuṭutta paricāvatu Arumoḻi teva vaḷanāṭṭu ne ṭṭuk ko
ṭṭuruṭaiyān Arayan rājentracoḻanā nā patika
ḷ Irājanārāyaṇa munaiyatarayar Ā kku nittala Ātican=tirātitta y vaitta
tirunan=tā viḷakku Onṟukku nāḷ Onṟukku tiruvaraṅka �l ney
Uḻakkāka Erikkaveṇṭum neykku nāṅkaḷ Ivar pakkal � ṇṭa cāvā

muvā pālāṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟu Ivvāṭu koṇṭu(ṭu) ṟum nā
ṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu Ittirunantāviḷakku On nittal paṭi
nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ varkattārum ttaval celu
ttakkaṭavomāka Ipparicu Icaintu sammātatiṭṭukkuṭuttom Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkate
var kanmikaḷukku Ivvaṉaivom
peruvāyil pakuvāyanāna tirumāliruñcolai konum
[āritan ] śrīmaturaikkonum maṇavāḷan cāttanum paḷḷi koṇ
ṭān raṅkanā konu yānum kovatta
nāna maṇavāḷakkonum ṅkakkonum kon Eḻuttu
ttakkaṭavomānom tiruvaraṅkattu sabhaiyom Itu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣai Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīvaiṣṇavakkaṇikku ciṟṟiyā lūr kiḻavan tiru The rest is lost.
Digital edition of SII 24.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
